title: Ashen Strike
description: Deal 6 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description: Deal 6 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
notes: Damage scales based on the number of cards in the Exhaust Pile. Each card in the Exhaust Pile adds 3 additional damage (4 when upgraded).
